view.name: KIRKA
view.label: Kirka
view.description: Dashboard for monitoring and managing the Kirka distributed task scheduler.

parameter.name: kirka.service.url
parameter.description: Base URL of the Kirka Server (e.g. http://kirka-host:8080)
parameter.label: Kirka Server URL

parameter.name: kirka.security.enabled
parameter.description: Whether security (Kerberos/SPNEGO) is enabled on the Kirka Server
parameter.label: Security Enabled

auto-instance.name: AUTO_KIRKA_INSTANCE
auto-instance.label: Kirka
auto-instance.description: Auto-created instance linked to the Kirka service
